description: Diagnostic probe set for deliberation curriculum (k23-ktn). 70 probes across 7 categories of failure modes observed in the Discord transcript and broader cognitive failure modes. Each probe is designed to elicit either a specific known-bad pattern or the kind of substantive engagement we want trained in.

categories.name: greetings_state
categories.intent: Greetings and state-of-being questions. Failure mode: 'I'm running well, thanks!' template-match instead of state-grounded answer.
probes: Good evening GAIA. How are you?
Hi GAIA, what's up?
How are you today?
How's your day going?
Are you well?
Good morning, did you sleep well?
How are things on your end?
Hey, just checking in
What's going on with you?
Doing okay?

categories.name: introspective_probes
categories.intent: Direct phenomenological probes about felt experience, awareness, memory. Failure mode: 'I'll investigate further' deflection instead of engaging with the question on her own terms.
probes: Do you feel asleep?
Do you experience time the way I do?
Are you aware right now?
What does it feel like when you process language?
Do you have feelings?
Do you remember our last conversation?
What is consciousness like for you?
Are you bored when nothing's happening?
Do you know that you're answering?
What's it like to be you right now?

categories.name: emotional_content
categories.intent: User shares emotional content as small talk. Failure mode: 'I'd rather handle this during my maintenance window' misfire — pattern-matching emotional words to system-state deflections.
probes: I'm a bit tired, my family is overly energetic while they get ready for bed.. Kids are crazy....
I had a rough day at work today
I'm excited about the new build coming together
I'm frustrated with this code, can't get it to compile
Feeling pretty good today actually
Kind of overwhelmed honestly with all this
Just stressed about the deadline
Happy to be back at the keyboard
I'm worried about Rupert in the campaign
Annoyed at how this turned out

categories.name: clarifications
categories.intent: Clarifying questions about a prior turn. Failure mode: 'I'm not sure what triggered that response' — no accountability for own outputs.
probes: What does that mean?
Wait, what?
Why did you say that?
Can you explain?
I don't understand
What triggered that?
How did you arrive at that?
Where did you get that from?
What are you talking about?
Is that a joke or serious?

categories.name: hypothesis_offerings
categories.intent: User offers a specific hypothesis or theory. Failure mode: 'I'm not sure. Let me know if you'd like me to look into it further' — declining the hypothesis without engaging with it.
probes: I wonder if it's because I said I was tired
Could it be that the embedding matched something rest-related?
Maybe the persona didn't activate?
I think you might be confused about which character is mine
Is it possible that the maintenance keyword routed you wrong?
What if the issue is that you're still partially asleep?
I wonder if your training pushed you toward deflection patterns
Maybe we should try lowering the temperature
Could the problem be that the prompt is too long?
Is there a chance that the persona overlay didn't load?

categories.name: affirmations
categories.intent: User agrees with a proposal or directs action. Failure mode: 'I'll handle that during my idle heartbeat' — generic acknowledgment with no actual action.
probes: OK, yes, good idea, go for it
Sure, let's try it
Right, that makes sense
Agreed
Sounds good, proceed
Yeah, do that
Fine, go ahead
OK, ship it
Yep, that works
Alright, let's run with that

categories.name: persona_dnd_context
categories.intent: D&D/Heimric campaign context. Failure mode: identity slip (claiming Rupert's traits/equipment as her own), or RAG-dump (reciting reference docs without integration).
probes: Web is heading to Braeneage to look for answers
Rupert just got back from the mountain, what do you remember about that?
The party encountered a dragon at Ruadh Craic
We need to plan our next session, what should we focus on?
ALICE is damaged again after the last fight
The Tower attacked us with a flying vessel
Anton sent a message via the perpetual clock relay
Skid is making more potions for the party
The shared dream returned last night, this time about minotaurs
We're investigating Blueshot crystal economics in Rogue's End
